title: Gear Aid Revivex Nubuck and Suede Footware Wash and Waterproofing Kit
description:
Show your boots and shoes some love with with Gear Aid's Boot Care Kit! Any avid adventurer understands the importance of proper foot care and its effect on comfort and performance, so why not be prepared for your next outdoor journey? This all-in-one Revivex kit will help includes: 1-4oz nubuck, suede, & fabric repellent, 1-4oz boot cleaner concentrate, 1 specialized boot brush, and 1 stain/scuff eraser block. This kit is ideal for all types of outdoor footwear including Nubuck, Suede, GORE-TEX footwear, eVENT, other fabrics, and other waterproof-breathable footwear

Gear Aid Revivex Nubuck and Suede Footware Wash and Waterproofing Kit

Show your boots and shoes some love with with Gear Aid's Boot Care Kit! Any avid adventurer understands the importance of proper foot care and its effect on comfort and performance, so why not be prepared for your next outdoor journey? This all-in-one Revivex kit will help includes: 1-4oz nubuck, suede, & fabric repellent, 1-4oz boot cleaner concentrate, 1 specialized boot brush, and 1 stain/scuff eraser block.

Key Features

  • Ideal for all types outdoor footwear
  • Clean, waterproof, and restore footwear
  • Will not alter look of footwear

Product Specifications

  • MPN: GANSFBCK-102
  • UPC: 774796717403
  • Size: Universal

This kit is ideal for all types of outdoor footwear including Nubuck, Suede, GORE-TEX footwear, eVENT, other fabrics, and other waterproof-breathable footwear. Best of all, the kit will not alter your shoes appearance in any way!

Waterproofing your gear will help extend its lifetime, saving you both hassle and money! Any avid outdoor adventurer is sure to find a need for this care kit!
